title: betula × aschersoniana
intro: Betula × aschersoniana, also known as the Birch-White Birch hybrid, is a deciduous tree that is a cross between Betula pendula and Betula pubescens. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Betula × aschersoniana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Betula × aschersoniana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
